import MethodEndpoint from "@theme/ApiExplorer/MethodEndpoint";
import ParamsDetails from "@theme/ParamsDetails";
import RequestSchema from "@theme/RequestSchema";
import StatusCodes from "@theme/StatusCodes";
import OperationTabs from "@theme/OperationTabs";
import TabItem from "@theme/TabItem";
import Heading from "@theme/Heading";
import Translate from "@docusaurus/Translate";

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Create a post"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"post"}
  path={"/api/posts"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



`uploadedAssetUrls` must be paths returned by the
[upload endpoint](/developers/api-reference/upload-files) (`/uploads/...`)
or Immich proxy paths for an album linked to **this** post's group —
arbitrary URLs are rejected. `latitude` and `longitude` must be
provided together.

Pass `groupIds` instead of `groupId` to **cross-post**: with 2 or more
target groups, the server creates one linked copy of the post per
group. For the author it behaves as a single post — editing or
deleting it edits/deletes every copy — but comments, reactions, and
favorites stay scoped to each group's own copy, and other members can
never tell it was cross-posted. Every target group must be one you
belong to, or the whole request is rejected with no post created.
Photos sourced from a linked media album (Immich/local) are copied
server-side into Famlin's own upload storage at post time so every
target group can see them without gaining access to the source
album; direct uploads are shared as-is.

Every target group's `allowedPostTypes` (see `Group`) must include
the requested `type` — for a cross-post, **all** target groups must
allow it, or the whole request is rejected with no post created.

`type: "POLL"` creates a poll: `content` is the poll's question
(required, non-empty) and `typeData` carries `{ options, closesAt? }`
— 2 to 10 options, each 1-100 characters. The server assigns each
option a stable id; options can't be added, removed, or edited after
creation. `closesAt` is optional and API-only (no composer support
yet) — once it passes, the poll stops accepting votes. Polls may also
carry `uploadedAssetUrls` like any other post.

`type: "TRIP"` creates a living travel journal: `typeData` carries
`{ title, destination?, startDate, endDate?, coverPhotoUrl?, travelerUserIds? }`
— `title` (1-120 chars) and `startDate` (`YYYY-MM-DD`) are required;
`destination` (≤160 chars), `endDate` (`YYYY-MM-DD`, must not be
before `startDate`), `coverPhotoUrl` (an uploaded `/uploads/...`
path), and `travelerUserIds` (up to 20 other group members who may
also check in — the author is always an implicit traveler and is
stripped if included) are all optional. A trip can't be cross-posted
— passing 2+ `groupIds` with `type: "TRIP"` is rejected with no post
created. Check-ins, closing the trip, and changing its travelers all
happen afterward via `POST /api/posts/{postId}/interactions` (see
below).

  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}

>

</Heading>
